steps.title: Identify the narrator's direct description
steps.content: The narrator explicitly states about his mother's chanting: “It was quiet and soothing.” This is the clearest signal about what he valued in the experience.

steps.title: Match the soothing quality to the choices
steps.content:
The narrator's explicit description of the chanting as “quiet and soothing”—a calm, peaceful experience—directly confirms D, which states he found the chanting calming.

The other three either contradict the passage (the poems weren't made up by his mother, and the chanting was nightly) or introduce details not in the text (background music).

That confirms D is correct.
